description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle operating in manual mode was parallel-parked on eastbound Bay Street in San Francisco when an SUV (Vehicle 2), 
traveling east in the adjacent lane, swiped the driver's side mirror on the Zoox vehicle. The Zoox vehicle sustained minor damage. The 
operator of Vehicle 2 did not stop and left the scene without exchanging information. There were no reported injuries, and police were not 
called.
Print
Clear Form
